name: White Chocolate Pecan Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the popped popcorn in a large bowl.
2. Put the candy coating in a 1-quart glass measure; microwave on HIGH for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until shiny. Stir to melt completely.
3. Stir in the pecans. Add to the popcorn and stir well to coat.
4. Spread on a cookie sheet and allow to cool completely.
